title: BaguetteLib
description: Ever tried to make a mod that needs proper death handling or inventory tracking? Yeah, NeoForge events suck for that.
body:
# BaguetteLib *** Ever tried to make a mod that needs proper death handling or inventory tracking? Yeah, NeoForge events suck for that. Support in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/3BnbkNWT99) ## What's in it *** **Death Events** * Catch deaths before they happen (cancel them if you want) * Do stuff after someone dies * Works on everything - players, mobs, whatever **Inventory Events** * Hotbar changes, armor swaps, picking stuff up * Get the old item and new item for each change * Special handling for hands and offhand ## Usage *** Add it to your mod, register some events:
 
@SubscribeEvent
public static void onPlayerPreDeath(PlayerDeathEvent.Pre event) {
    // Do whatever you want here
}
That's it. No mixins, no extra crap. *** _Made by a developer who got tired of working around NeoForge event limitations._   If you'd like to support me and the development of my mods, I recommend trying out BisectHosting. Use code "project8gbderam" to get 25% off your first month of a gaming server for new customers.
